reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. No paro nunca más aunque lo hice durante años. No me quisieron hacer el descuento de socio. Me trataron mal. Antes era bueno ahora mejor seguir de largo! Todo deplorable!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I'm never stopping there again, even though I did for years. They refused to give me my member discount. They treated me badly. It used to be good, but now it's best to just keep walking! Everything was deplorable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacC1ybkZ3EAE
